description: Install .NET 8 SDK and Node.js CDK CLI, restore NuGet packages, and verify baseline build and tests pass.
steps: Install .NET 8 SDK using the dotnet-install.sh script from Microsoft (curl -sSL https://dot.net/v1/dotnet-install.sh | bash /dev/stdin --channel 8.0). Add to PATH.
Install AWS CDK CLI globally via npm: npm install -g aws-cdk
Run: dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln --verbosity normal - confirm all 3 existing tests pass
Run: npx cdk synth - confirm it synthesizes successfully
acceptance_criteria: dotnet build src/CdkBase.sln succeeds with exit code 0
dotnet test src/CdkBase.sln reports all 3 tests passing (2 pass, 1 skipped)
npx cdk synth produces CloudFormation output without errors
findings: dotnet 8.0.421 installed at $HOME/.dotnet. NODE_OPTIONS env var must be set to empty string (NODE_OPTIONS='') before running dotnet test or cdk synth because the sandbox sets NODE_OPTIONS=--require /opt/amazon/kiro-agent/proxy-bootstrap.js which breaks JSII runtime. All commands require: export DOTNET_ROOT=$HOME/.dotnet && export PATH=$PATH:$HOME/.dotnet:$HOME/.dotnet/tools && export NODE_OPTIONS=''. Tests: 2 passed, 1 skipped (Stack_HasS3BucketForAudioIngestion is a TDD placeholder). cdk synth produces valid CloudFormation output.
